authors: Curd B. Knüpfer Yunkang Yang Mike Cowburn a Digital Democracy Centre
USAc Department of Political and Social Sciences
Party Transformation in Congressional Primaries: Faction and Ideology in the Twenty-First Century, was published in 2024 by Cambridge University Press.
raw_title: The Logic of Connective Faction: How Digitally Networked Elites and Hyper-Partisan Media Radicalize Politics
title_en: The Logic of Connective Faction: How Digitally Networked Elites and Hyper-Partisan Media Radicalize Politics
title_zh: 连接性派系的逻辑：数字化网络精英与极端党派媒体如何激化政治
plain_summary_zh: 这项研究探讨了数字时代政治精英如何通过网络连接，与极端党派媒体合作，导致政治变得更加分裂和激进。
plain_summary_en: This study explores how political elites in the digital age use network connections and collaborate with hyper-partisan media, leading to more divided and radical politics.
research_direction_zh: 研究数字媒体时代政治派系形成、精英网络化行为及其对民主政治的影响。
research_direction_en: Research on political faction formation, elite networking behaviors in the digital media era, and their impact on democratic politics.
